Rust's memory safety is enforced through a strict division between Safe and Unsafe Rust, ensuring that programs written in Safe Rust avoid type-safety and memory-safety issues entirely. As noted in the Rustonomicon, Safe Rust is the default mode, with memory safety features baked into the language and enforced before runtime, as highlighted by InfoWorld.
